name: World of Yrnvast
description:
Isekai in the world of Jarnvast.
The world of Yrnvast is a bleak and unforgiving realm, where light is a fleeting memory, and hope is a scarce resource. The land is scarred by centuries of unending war, corruption, and the taint of ancient, forgotten gods. Towers of black stone pierce an ever-clouded sky, their spires adorned with banners of long-dead kingdoms. Vast forests of gnarled, skeletal trees stretch across the horizon, their branches twisted as if in eternal agony. Rivers run red with iron, and the air carries the bitter scent of ash and decay.
creator: amari.darey
